title: Moroccan Fish Tagine
description: A richly flavored Moroccan dish featuring hummus, confit tomato, and pescatarian friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Preheat the bamboo steamer to medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, moroccan spice blend, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cod fillets to the bowl and coat with the marinade.
Place the cod fillets in the bamboo steamer and cook for 8 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together hummus and confit tomato.
After the cod has cooked for 8 minutes, top each piece with a spoonful of the hummus and confit tomato mixture.
Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes, until the fish is cooked through.
Serve the Moroccan fish tagine hot, garnished with chopped onion and a side of steamed vegetables.
